name: Is Sun's SPARC Architecture on Life Support?
description: Kastner blog post on OnComputersTips observing Sun's long-hyped Rock chip is apparently dead and that — with the pending Oracle-Sun merger and Solaris already on X64 commodity servers — the case for SPARC is gone. Kastner muses that Oracle has the opportunity to create a one-stop IT shop with the full hardware-to-application stack, unmatched since IBM exited the application software business 40 years earlier.
